description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to build and test Thug on ubuntu-18.04 with Python versions 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, and 3.9. The workflow should check out the repository, set up Python, install libemu and dependencies, install Tox, build Thug, and run tests with Tox and CODECOV_TOKEN from secrets.
